vwap.summary: Raised ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.0σ → 1.5σ following issue #1200 threshold sweep (8 random 30-day windows, May 2025-April 2026): 1.5σ mean Sharpe 0.015 vs 1.0σ 0.011, mean total R 6.38 vs 6.02, 4/8 positive windows vs 3/8. Cadence drops ~30% (387 → 295 trades/30d). Same ordering as the 38-month V6 experiment, so not regime-overfit

Added min_r_for_vwap_cross (0.25R) + min_hold_minutes_for_vwap_cross (10m) gates on the vwap_cross close path — suppresses micro-R exits from VWAP-drifts-to-price (3/6 closes on 2026-05-14 exited at R-capture 0.009-0.085, net loss after fees)
Raised SL_STD_MULT 0.5→0.75 + added ATR floor on stop distance — reduces premature SL hits on volatile bars
Fixed order_package() SL always falling back to 2% flat stop regardless of signal SL
Added 4h EMA-200 ±2% HTF trend gate — backtest Sharpe -0.39→+2.47, walk-forward OOS +0.22→+1.10
Changed timeframe 15m→5m for faster mean-reversion signal cadence

turtle_soup.summary: Cadence pair: min_sweep_buffer_bps=10, tp1_at_r=1.00, setup_lookback_bars=4 — OOS Sharpe +1.22→+2.48
Tightened atr_stop_mult 0.35→0.30 (+0.53 Sharpe full-sample, +0.97 OOS, no cadence cost)
